title: Debug workout lab 401 and create thread

log.context: Debug workout lab 401 and create thread

Done. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** Field name mismatch between clunger and the workout lab. Clunger's `/api/me` returns `{ username: "..." }`, but the workout lab's `getUser()` function read `data.login` — which was always `undefined`. This made `getUser()` return `null` on every call, triggering 401s on all protected API endpoints.

**Not the issue:** The `tauth_github` cookie is correctly scoped to `Domain=.clung.us`, so labs.clung.us receives it fine from the browser.

**Fix applied t...(truncated)
